items.title_en: Super Micro stock jumps 19% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
items.title_zh: Super Micro 股价因收入增长一倍以上而上涨 19%
items.desc_en: Super Micro pointed to progress in U.S. manufacturing in issuing a stronger-than-expected quarterly forecast.
items.desc_zh: 超微发布强于预期的季度预测，指出美国制造业取得进展。

items.title_en: U.S. says the Iran ceasefire holds despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz and against UAE - NPR
items.title_zh: 美国表示，尽管霍尔木兹海峡和阿联酋遭受袭击，伊朗仍维持停火 - NPR
items.desc_en: U.S. says the Iran ceasefire holds despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz and against UAE  NPRIran War Live Updates: Trump Suggests U.S.-Iran Cease-Fire Remains Despite Strait of Hormuz Escalations  The
items.desc_zh: 美国表示，尽管霍尔木兹海峡发生袭击并针对阿联酋，但伊朗仍维持停火 NPRIran 战争实时更新：特朗普建议，尽管霍尔木兹海峡局势升级，美伊仍维持停火

items.title_en: FDA withdrew studies finding Covid, shingles vaccines were safe
items.title_zh: FDA 撤回了发现新冠病毒和带状疱疹疫苗安全的研究
items.desc_en: The studies were "withdrawn because the authors drew broad conclusions that were not supported by the underlying data," the spokesperson told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 该发言人告诉 CNBC，这些研究“被撤回，因为作者得出了没有基础数据支持的广泛结论”。

items.title_en: EV maker Lucid plans to adjust production, citing elevated vehicle inventories
items.title_zh: 电动汽车制造商 Lucid 计划以汽车库存增加为由调整产量
items.desc_en: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.
items.desc_zh: Lucid 集团表示，将采取措施更好地调整其生产，以满足客户对其豪华全电动汽车的需求。

items.title_en: AMD tops estimates for first quarter as data center revenue jumps 57%
items.title_zh: AMD 第一季度数据中心收入跃升 57%，超出预期
items.desc_en: AMD's earnings report lands as investors rush into the stock on optimism that the AI boom is just getting started.
items.desc_zh: AMD 的收益报告发布之际，投资者对人工智能热潮才刚刚开始感到乐观，纷纷涌入该股。

items.title_en: Small caps put on their best monthly showing since 2020. Bank of America says there's more upside ahead
items.title_zh: 小盘股创下 2020 年以来的最佳月度表现。美国银行表示未来还有更多上涨空间
items.desc_en: The Russell 2000 surged in April. Bank of America highlights ETFs to play small caps and enhance returns.
items.desc_zh: 罗素 2000 指数在 4 月份飙升。美国银行强调 ETF 可以发挥小盘股的作用并提高回报。

items.title_en: Aluminum prices are surging. Here's how companies are handling the costs
items.title_zh: 铝价正在飙升。以下是公司处理成本的方式
items.desc_en: Aluminum's surge in the wake of the U.S-Iran war is creating cost pressures for some of America's largest companies.
items.desc_zh: 美伊战争后铝价的飙升给美国一些最大的公司带来了成本压力。

items.title_en: Data suggests 'hiring recession' may be behind us — but the Iran war poses job market risks
items.title_zh: 数据显示“招聘衰退”可能已经过去，但伊朗战争带来就业市场风险
items.desc_en: Hiring activity increased in March, according to federal data issued Tuesday. However, the Iran war threatens to stall that progress in the job market.
items.desc_zh: 根据周二发布的联邦数据，三月份招聘活动有所增加。然而，伊朗战争可能会阻碍就业市场的进展。

items.desc_zh: 布罗克曼是在马斯克和 OpenAI 的萨姆·奥尔特曼为期一个月的试验的第二周发表讲话的。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: A sleep apnoea wearable. Plus, tech to free up hospital beds and a breast health app.
items.desc_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停可穿戴设备。此外，还有可释放医院床位的技术和乳房健康应用程序。

items.title_en: Iran doesn’t have ‘kamikaze dolphins,’ Hegseth says. But marine mammals have a long history of military use
items.title_zh: 赫格斯说，伊朗没有“神风特攻队海豚”。但海洋哺乳动物具有悠久的军事用途历史
items.desc_en: Several countries, including the U.S., have a history of using dolphins in conflict areas, though not as weapons.
items.desc_zh: 包括美国在内的一些国家有在冲突地区使用海豚的历史，但不是作为武器。

items.title_en: U.S. says 'Project Freedom' will reopen Hormuz Strait for commerce. Experts are skeptical
items.title_zh: 美国表示“自由计划”将重新开放霍尔木兹海峡进行商业活动。专家对此表示怀疑
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump announced the operation Sunday, saying the U.S. will "guide" ships stuck due to the Iran war through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周日宣布了这一行动，称美国将“引导”因伊朗战争而陷入困境的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title_en: Intel and Micron are poised to break major milestones
items.title_zh: 英特尔和美光准备打破重大里程碑
items.desc_en: Options traders can't get enough of semiconductor stocks.
items.desc_zh: 期权交易者无法获得足够的半导体股票。

items.title_en: Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap as rally in memory stocks accelerates
items.title_zh: 随着内存股加速上涨，美光市值突破 7000 亿美元
items.desc_en: Micron has emerged as one of the most valuable U.S. tech companies thanks to insatiable demand for memory that's needed in AI chips.
items.desc_zh: 由于人工智能芯片所需的内存需求旺盛，美光已成为美国最有价值的科技公司之一。

items.title_en: SEC advances Trump-backed proposal to end mandatory quarterly earnings reports

items.title_en: Zelensky condemns Russian 'utter cynicism' as it strikes ahead of truce
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基谴责俄罗斯在停战前发动袭击“完全愤世嫉俗”

items.desc_zh: 2022年，波音737飞机坠入中国山坡，机上132人全部遇难。

items.title_zh: 游艇在澳大利亚海岸沉没 救援人员三人死亡
items.desc_en: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.
items.desc_zh: 78 岁和 62 岁的志愿者救援人员在他们的船在“危险”的条件下翻滚后死亡。

items.title_en: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
items.title_zh: 马里军政府领导人在前任被杀后自称为国防部长
items.desc_en: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.
items.desc_zh: 前国防部长萨迪奥·卡马拉在圣战分子和分离主义势力联合发动的大规模攻势中身亡。

items.title_en: Britney Spears pleads guilty to reckless driving after arrest
items.title_zh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯被捕后承认鲁莽驾驶罪
items.desc_en: The 44-year-old will avoid jail time after her arrest in California earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 这位 44 岁的女子今年早些时候在加州被捕后将避免入狱。

items.title_en: Three Russian diplomats expelled from Austria over spying accusations
items.title_zh: 三名俄罗斯外交官因间谍指控被奥地利驱逐
items.desc_en: They gathered information using a "forest of antennas" installed on top of diplomatic buildings, the foreign minister says.
items.desc_zh: 外交部长说，他们利用安装在外交建筑顶部的“天线森林”收集信息。

items.title_en: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
items.title_zh: 德国莱比锡市一辆汽车冲入人群，造成两人死亡、多人受伤
items.desc_en: Mayor Burkhard Jung said a suspect was detained and the motive was unclear.
items.desc_zh: 市长 Burkhard Jung 表示，一名嫌疑人已被拘留，动机尚不清楚。

items.title_en: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机在胜利日庆祝活动前袭击莫斯科高档高层建筑
items.desc_en: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 此次袭击发生之际，克里姆林宫正准备在周六举行规模较小的阅兵式。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会带来更准确的民意调查吗？
items.desc_en: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?
items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能收集人们的意见更便宜、更快捷，但它会让民意调查更准确吗？

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”

items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.title_en: Meta in row after workers who say they saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
items.title_zh: 那些声称看到智能眼镜用户发生性行为的工人失业后，Meta 连续失业

items.desc_zh: Meta 及其分包商对于为何裁员 1000 多名肯尼亚工人存在分歧。
